summary: Round 21 card is Panthers, Roosters, Storm, Raiders, Warriors, Broncos, Titans and Sharks. Round 20 has been validated as 8 from 8. Sportsbet market favourites are used as leader-behaviour signals; the two controlled splits are Storm over Rabbitohs and Titans over Dragons.

sources.label: Sportsbet NRL Tips and Predictions - Round 21
NRL Team Lists: Round 20 result lines

scoreboard.note: Protect pick: Sportsbet has Panthers $1.19. Eels regain Moses, but Penrith remain the leader-safe market pick.
Market match: Sportsbet has Roosters $1.72. Tedesco returns for Sydney and Newcastle lose Dane Gagai to calf tightness.
Controlled split: Sportsbet has Souths $1.57 and Storm $2.41, but official teams name Jahrome Hughes back while Souths are without Cameron Murray and Tallis Duncan.
Protect pick: Sportsbet has Raiders $1.22. Canberra lose Hudson Young and Owen Pattie, but the Tigers are on debut/judiciary watch.
Protect pick: Sportsbet has Warriors $1.51. Canterbury regain Crichton and Kikau, but the Warriors remain the stronger ladder side.
Market match: Sportsbet has Broncos $1.77. Brisbane's returning stars beat Penrith last week; Cowboys have Dearden/Clifford but come in off five straight losses.
Tiny split: Sportsbet has Dragons $1.90 and Titans $1.94. TipBot takes Gold Coast's attacking upside after the Manly win.
Protect pick: Sportsbet has Sharks $1.64. Manly are without Tom Trbojevic; Cronulla regain Ramien, Talakai and Colquhoun.

liveAlerts.text: Round 20 validated: TipBot card went 8 from 8.
Round 21 card live: Panthers, Roosters, Storm, Raiders, Warriors, Broncos, Titans and Sharks.
Market-aware strategy: match six favourites, split on Storm over Rabbitohs and Titans over Dragons.
Main ladder-value pick: Storm over Rabbitohs at $2.41 against a Souths $1.57 market favourite.
No Round 21 charity bet is locked; tipping-comp strategy does not move the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger.
